title: VigyanLLM: Sovereign Biomedical AI Platform
description: VigyanLLM is a production-grade biomedical AI platform offering a comprehensive suite of bioinformatics tools for molecular biology research. The platform includes automated primer design with 22-step biophysical validation (VPrime 2.0), BLAST sequence search, molecular docking and protein docking, multiple sequence alignment (MSA), PCR analysis, CRISPR analysis, Tm and GC calculators, DNA-to-RNA conversion, and 3D DNA visualization. Designed for researchers in molecular biology, clinical diagnostics, and biotechnology, VigyanLLM provides free tools with GPU-accelerated processing for the global research community.
